title: 5oz // 12 Pack Apothecary Jars - Glass Jars with Cork Stopper Lids, Made in Germany, Storage for spice, teas, essential oils, bath salts, glitter, potion & spell bottle
description:
About this item
STRONG: This set of small glass bottles features rock solid design; All glass bottles with corks are made in Germany and designed to be extra tough; If you need mini glass bottles with cork stoppers that will hold up under any conditions, look no further than Jartastix
QUALITY: Each one of our jars with cork lids has undergone stringent quality inspection and many hours of development; This set of 6 glass bottles with corks is crafted to the highest standards; Our promise is this; if we wouldn’t use the mini bottles with corks ourselves, we won’t sell them
VERSATILE: People love our small bottles with corks because of their almost limitless range of uses; They make great potion vials for Halloween, are the perfect spice jar for organizing your kitchen and can even be used as a sand art bottle if you’re feeling crafty, or use them as pill bottles or decorative jars to keep your home organized
EASY GRIP: The stopper of our glass jars with cork lids has been specifically crafted to be easy to open; With a deep cork lid that’s easy to get a hold of, our bottles with cork stoppers solve the problem of fiddling around with difficult to open lids
SATISFACTION GUARANTEED: If you don’t love our glass jars with corks, simplylet us know what the issue is with your set of bottles with corks; At Jartastix, we pride ourselves on excellent customer service and outstanding quality
› See more product details
reviews_5s: These were perfect for Halloween treats. I turned them into witch’s potion bottles, filled with layers of small Halloween candies and peanuts. Ribbons and creepy labels, also found on Amazon, completed the transformation! My grandkids loved them. The bottles arrived in great shape, packed well. The corks had a little musty smell but they survived a soapy hand wash which seemed to ease the odor.These are very nice glass bottles. I ordered these because I have started a small garden with lavender and mint and needed something to put my dry product in. These water very nice exactly as described.Absolutely love these. Thick, sturdy. Takes the wax well when I seal with wax. Will definitely be buying more, for customers and for my own personal growing apothecary. Wish they came in 12 or 24 packs! My customers love them too!I was so pleased with this product that I ordered it again. The quality is great, it was well packaged & I received it very quickly. I highly recommend these jars.These jars are a great addition to my spice cabinet. They came very well packaged. I will buy more as I need them.Great jars very durable and cute.Cork shrinks hard to get openI got these to store glitter and they work perfectly.Nice looking, great for spicesPerfect for a product/ingredient display.
